design_philosophy: Fullscreen cinematic hero, Editorial typography, Large whitespace, Premium product presentation, Minimal luxury UI, White background, Black typography, Red accent color (#D90429), Large CTA buttons, Fullscreen sections, Scroll storytelling, Sticky floating header, Premium mobile-first layout. Mimics high-fashion editorial e-commerce but for books.

rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none text-[#0A0A0A]
rules.label: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-semibold text-[#0A0A0A]

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Utilize large whitespace to evoke luxury.

layout_modes.product_grid: Asymmetrical masonry or bento grid with varying span sizes to break standard e-commerce monotony.
layout_modes.editorial_sections: Large text columns paired with massive offset imagery.

effects: Hover lift and subtle drop-shadow on product cards

navigation.style: Sticky floating header, Glassmorphism (Crystal clear, backdrop-blur-xl, bg-white/80, 1px subtle bottom border border-black/5)
navigation.layout: Logo left, Hamburger menu / Links center, Search/Wishlist/Cart/Profile right.

hero.visuals: Ancient book opening, pages turning, fantasy castle emerging, paper particles, magic smoke, cinematic depth of field, white luxury background.
hero.content: Headline: 'EVERY STORY BEGINS HERE', Subheading: 'AI Powered Story Marketplace', CTAs: 'Explore Books', 'Customize Your Book', Scroll indicator at bottom.

book_cards.style: Flat, minimal, large cover focus. No generic box-shadows. 1px solid border on hover.
book_cards.layout: Cover image (aspect-[2/3] or 3/4), Title (Playfair Display, tight), Author (Outfit, small), Price (Outfit, Bold), Rating, and 'Quick View'/'Add to Cart' appearing on hover overlay.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D90429] text-white hover:bg-[#B00320] transition-colors rounded-none px-8 py-4
buttons.secondary: bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white hover:bg-[#333333] transition-colors rounded-none px-8 py-4
buttons.outline: border border-[#0A0A0A] text-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#0A0A0A] hover:text-white transition-colors rounded-none px-8 py-4

forms_and_inputs.style: Shadcn based. Minimalist lines. border-b-2 border-[#E5E5E5] focus:border-[#D90429] rounded-none bg-transparent.

sections_required: Categories (Fantasy, Mystery, Romance, Sci-Fi, Adventure, Horror, Classics, Children, Manga)
Book Customizer (Live 3D preview, Cover material, Foil, AI generated cover)
Collections (Editor's Picks, New Releases, Award Winners)

vintage_books.description: Ornate leather book cover with gold details

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, representing the element's role.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use JavaScript (JS/JSX) strictly. Do not use TypeScript.
Implement Lenis for smooth scroll on the root layout.

Build the 3D Hero using Canvas from R3F, creating a minimal floating book with magic particles. If actual 3D models are unavailable, use abstract geometry and lighting to mimic magical pages/particles in a premium white setting.
Ensure headings use Playfair Display and text tracking is extremely tight to mimic print magazines.
Do not use generic Shadcn cards with borders/shadows for products. Instead, build custom minimalistic book covers. Use the provided image URLs.
Use the Red Accent (#D90429) sparingly—primarily on main CTAs, active states, or sale tags to make it pop against the black and white theme.
